emails.subject: Lindholm Oil , Inc.
emails.body: Lindholm Oil Inc. 6575 500 MMbtu/d 100% Gas Daily less $.15 I will create a committed reserves ticket for the remaining term of the deal once our geologists have gathered enough data to forecast the reserves of this well, at such time, we will request that this ticket be zeroed out. Please supply the sitara number once entered. If you have any questions, please give me a call. Susan x 33321 Forwarded by Susan Smith/HOU/ECT on 02/14/2000 03:25 PM Vance L Taylor 02/08/2000 09:31 AM
